scrapedPosts.caption:
What Happened: Police have arrested a suspect involved in assaulting and opening fire on a girl during a robbery attempt in Rawalpindi, officials said on Thursday.

What you need to know: According to police sources, the arrest was carried out by a team formed under SSP Operations Tariq Mehboob after reviewing CCTV footage of the incident. The suspect, identified as Sabeel, is reportedly from Kashmir. A case had earlier been registered at the Waris Khan Police Station on the complaint of the victim.

What more: CCTV footage, which later went viral on social media, showed the suspect attempting to snatch the girl’s bag. When she resisted, he allegedly assaulted her and opened fire before fleeing the scene
